code: import{useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import"./AuthForm.css";import"./Sidebar.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function AuthForm(){const[isLogin,setIsLogin]=useState(true);const[form,setForm]=useState({email:"",password:""});const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!form.email||!form.password)return;localStorage.setItem("isAuthenticated","true");navigate("/dashboard");};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"auth-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"auth-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:isLogin?"Welcome Back":"Create Account"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"Enter Email",value:form.email,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,email:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Enter Password",value:form.password,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,password:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:isLogin?"Login":"Signup"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{onClick:()=>setIsLogin(!isLogin),className:"toggle-text",children:isLogin?"Don't have an account?
